metrics.label: Exports growth, YoY

metrics.label: Trade balance
metrics.source_label: Statistics Agency SIAT trade data, calculated
caveats: Displayed value is in USD billion (negative = goods trade deficit); calculated from SIAT cumulative monthly goods trade levels.
Label goods trade balance if services are excluded.
warnings: Owner approved calculated trade balance from official observed SIAT export and import levels; current lock unit remains broad pending later cleanup.

metrics.label: CBU policy rate
metrics.source_label: Central Bank of Uzbekistan policy rate
caveats: Event-based setting; do not infer policy stance without inflation context.

metrics.label: USD/UZS exchange rate
metrics.source_label: Central Bank of Uzbekistan exchange rate
caveats: Official/reference rate, not transaction-weighted market average.
Latest observation: requested 2026-04-28; actual CBU date/rate 2026-04-28, 12072.96 UZS per USD.
Prior-month comparison observation: requested 2026-03-28; actual CBU date/rate 2026-03-27 returned for requested 2026-03-28, 12179.87 UZS per USD.
warnings: Prior-month requested date 2026-03-28 differed from actual CBU date 2026-03-27; nearest available CBU observation was used.

metrics.label: USD/UZS monthly change
caveats: Latest observation: requested 2026-04-28; actual CBU date/rate 2026-04-28, 12072.96 UZS per USD.
Prior-month comparison observation: requested 2026-03-28; actual CBU date/rate 2026-03-27 returned for requested 2026-03-28, 12179.87 UZS per USD.
Prior-year comparison observation: requested 2025-04-28; actual CBU date/rate 2025-04-28, 12957.14 UZS per USD.
Formula: ((latest - comparison) / comparison) * 100.
Rounded to 2 decimal places.
Positive means USD/UZS is higher, i.e. UZS depreciation against USD; negative means USD/UZS is lower, i.e. UZS appreciation against USD.
warnings: Prior-month requested date 2026-03-28 differed from actual CBU date 2026-03-27; nearest available CBU observation was used.

metrics.label: USD/UZS annual change
caveats: Latest observation: requested 2026-04-28; actual CBU date/rate 2026-04-28, 12072.96 UZS per USD.
Prior-month comparison observation: requested 2026-03-28; actual CBU date/rate 2026-03-27 returned for requested 2026-03-28, 12179.87 UZS per USD.
Prior-year comparison observation: requested 2025-04-28; actual CBU date/rate 2025-04-28, 12957.14 UZS per USD.
Formula: ((latest - comparison) / comparison) * 100.
Rounded to 2 decimal places.
Positive means USD/UZS is higher, i.e. UZS depreciation against USD; negative means USD/UZS is lower, i.e. UZS appreciation against USD.

metrics.label: REER level
caveats: Index definition: 2019=100.
Methodology note: CPI-deflated real effective exchange rate, trade-weighted basket.
